blocks.content: On Friday they rode home together.
For two blocks neither of them said anything.

blocks.speaker: Kit
blocks.content: Eli thinks he's actually running for class president.

blocks.speaker: Daisy
blocks.content: He's been running for something since fourth grade.

blocks.speaker: Kit
blocks.content: He actually might win this time.
Kit took the corner wide and Daisy ran the yellow light.
She was quiet for a beat. The afternoon was warm and the street smelled like cut grass and it was almost like before.

blocks.speaker: Daisy
blocks.content: I didn't handle it well either.

blocks.speaker: Kit
blocks.content: I kind of deserved the offline.
She almost smiled. Not quite, but almost.
